channel.title: Iva Kobalava Articles
channel.description: Notes on frontend architecture, product delivery, and building polished developer experiences.

item.title: Building a Safari window inside a desktop portfolio
item.description: How I approached turning a portfolio into a small operating-system illusion without losing clarity or performance.

item.title: Frontend systems that scale beyond the first release
item.description: The difference between shipping a fast v1 and building a frontend that still feels coherent after dozens of features.

item.title: What I care about when shipping product UI
item.description: A short list of the product qualities I watch for when turning requirements into interfaces people actually trust.
